reason: Reducible to authority + law + existing applicability metadata; does not introduce a distinct structural role.
systemImpact: Reintroducing jurisdiction as a first-class concept would duplicate authority already structured by law, confuse applicability metadata with concept identity, and create an avoidable compression layer in the governance graph.
removalTestResult: The system retains recognized standing, rule-structuring, and applicability control without a standalone jurisdiction concept. Existing authority, law, and applicability metadata already cover the proposed role.
